title: Combine random affine CNN with time-based cosine LR decay
methodology: Added a time-based cosine learning-rate decay inside the existing training loop while keeping the current 2-conv CNN, random affine augmentation, dataset, and 90-second budget unchanged.
motivation: Prompted by the research brief suggestion to combine successful elements, specifically codex-mnist-2 keep exp-007 and codex-mnist-1 keep exp-011.
